name: JANUS HENDERSON GROUP PLC
summary: Overview Janus Henderson Groupplc (JHG, the Company, we, us, our and similar terms), a company incorporated and registered in Jersey, Channel Islands, is an independent global asset manager, specializing ininvestment managementacross all major asset classes. Through its predecessor companies,JHG traces its lineage back to 1934 when Henderson Group plc (Henderson) was founded. We are a client-focused global business with more than2,300employees worldwide and assets under management (AUM) of $493....
